stemHtml:
An aircraft is making an approach to an airfield when the pilots receive this windshear warning:

"Wind over the airfield is 160/05 kts, wind to the north-east is 060/25 kts"

What is most likely to be the cause?

options.a: A weak warm front passing the airfield is causing the change in the wind direction.
options.b: A cold front moving east is causing a marked veering of the wind from centre field to the boundary.
options.c: An active anticyclone over the airfield.
